Class TerminalRenderer

java.lang.Object
simcli.ui.TerminalRenderer
All Implemented Interfaces:
IRenderer
public class TerminalRenderer extends Object implements IRenderer
Concrete implementation of IRenderer for terminal-based display. All output is routed through UIManager for consistency.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    TerminalRenderer()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clear()
    Clears the terminal screen.
    void
    printHint()
    Prints a randomly selected gameplay hint.
    void
    renderActions(Sim activePlayer, List<Interactable> items, boolean isResidential)
    Renders the grid of available actions (interactables + system commands).
    void
    renderActiveSimStats(Sim activePlayer, List<Sim> neighborhood)
    Renders detailed stats for the currently controlled Sim right above the action menu
    void
    renderDeathStats(Sim deadSim)
    Renders the memorial statistics block when a Sim dies.
    void
    renderHouseholdDashboard(List<Sim> neighborhood, Sim activePlayer)
    Renders a compact dashboard of other alive Sims in the neighborhood
    void
    renderHUD(Sim player, Building location, int day, String formattedTime, String timeOfDay, boolean inRoom, String roomName)
    Renders the main HUD showing day, time, location, and the active player's current need values.

    • printHint

      public void printHint()

      Prints a randomly selected gameplay hint.

      printHint in interface IRenderer

    • renderHUD

      public void renderHUD(Sim player, Building location, int day, String formattedTime, String timeOfDay, boolean inRoom, String roomName)
      Renders the main HUD showing day, time, location, and the active player's current need values.

      Implementation Note: This method deliberately resets the player's ActionState to IDLE immediately after rendering, ensuring action-specific ASCII art does not persist onto the next turn.

      Specified by:
      renderHUD in interface IRenderer

    • renderActions

      public void renderActions(Sim activePlayer, List<Interactable> items, boolean isResidential)
      Description copied from interface: IRenderer
      Renders the grid of available actions (interactables + system commands).
      Specified by:
      renderActions in interface IRenderer
      Parameters:
      activePlayer - the currently controlled Sim
      items - interactable objects at the current location
      isResidential - whether house-specific commands should be shown
